text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Passing by a ramen shop, I swear that I hear King
Halo's voice coming from within, and decide to
take a peek inside.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hooray! Hooray! SPE-CIAL WEEK! HOORAAAY!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahhh! That was delicious!

text_block_list.name: Ramen Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! You completed the Mega-Sized
Challenge!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The way everyone cheered you on at the Fan Fest
was incredible! It moved me to tears!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! Your fans were all on the edge of their seats,
hollering their hearts out! I'd love to be on the
receiving end of such aplausos at least once!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Heehee! Well, it wasn't that impressive!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I know! Why don't I bestow some royal
encouragement to you all instead? Come, rejoice
at my generosity!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? You'll cheer for us?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...So, apparently, that's how King Halo ended up
making rounds and cheering for her friends.
choice_data_list:
You must really be serious about this if you're
all dressed up for it.

You must really be serious about this if you're
all dressed up for it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But of course! Did you think I would offer
anything less than my first-rate support?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I designed this outfit myself, specifically for my role as a cheerleader!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It is absolutely crucial if I am to provide first-rate
cheering!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Now come, to our next destination!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just like that, I'm unwittingly assigned to be her attendant. I am concerned about how this will unfold, though, so I follow along as told.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hooray! Hooray! SEI-UN SKY! Do your best! Do
your—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Um... Could you please direct your
encouragement toward that there boulder?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pardon me? At that boulder? Well, as you wish...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Do your best! Do your best! Hooray for Sky!
Hooray!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you're here! Por favor, join me in cheering
for Mambo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Mambo? And who is that?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Mambooo! You've gotta nail this next somersault!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Um, ah... I'm not sure whom I'm addressing, but
do your best! Do your best! MA-M-BO!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for being mindful of our setting and
adjusting your encouragement accordingly.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, yes... I think I'll arrange today's flowers with
your support as the motif...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Pant... Huff... Traveling about and offering encouragement is actually rather taxing.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
From this? Absurd! Today has been an absolute
picnic!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And more importantly, my first-rate support was
phenomenal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems proud of her efforts, even if some of
her cheering was directed at inanimate objects... I
hope the boulder and flowers felt encouraged.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Muchas gracias for your support today! Mambo
seemed to really like the cadencia of your
cheering and finally got the hang of
somersaulting!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
You granted me a new perspective from which to
arrange flowers. I'd be obliged if you could cheer
for me again in the future.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You got the fish from that rock pool to come out
too. It was fun. It's nice when things get a little
lively sometimes. ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Your encouragement helped me lots too, King! I
was able to finish a whole Mega-Sized portion of
noodles in record speed!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If you ever need any help, feel free to tell us!
We'll do our best to s'pport you, too!
choice_data_list: Your tour was a massive success!
Your tour was a massive success!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Hmph! I'm too flawless to ever need
anyone's assistance!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But I commend you for recognizing my true
brilliance!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Do inform me if you require further
encouragement in the future. Should I feel so
inclined, I might just lend you my support again!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're so brave for saying that with a red face! ♪
Ooh, you must be trying to hide how embarrassed
you are!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I hate to disappoint you, but I'll not rise to
your ribbing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
This experience has simply reminded me of my
own excellence! That's all!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo laughs raucously with an utterly
delighted look on her face.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah... It only looks that way because of the sunset.
Such gratitude is nothing out of the ordinary for
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she says it's the setting sun that's reddening her
cheeks, then I see no reason to question it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You dolt! I'm not blushing in the slightest! I'm just
touched by—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, so that's it. ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! You didn't hear that! Come now, what
are you all smiling about?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, King Halo remains as evasive about her
true feelings as ever.
